# Allan Medeiros — Solutions Architect

I design technical solutions for complex systems: service structure, cloud placement,
integrations, and delivery. Most of my work is in banking and insurance. Porto, Portugal.

## Focus
- Solution design (options, trade-offs, decision records)
- Cloud platforms: Azure/AKS, GCP, AWS; Java / Spring Boot / Kubernetes
- System integration (APIs, middleware)
- Legacy-to-cloud migration
- Delivery practice: CI/CD, architecture review, specs for LLM-assisted coding in production

## Selected work (employer names omitted)
- Insurance platform: Spring Boot / Kubernetes multi-service design
- Legacy → AWS migration: ~25% lower run cost, ~40% less downtime on migrated paths
- Enterprise integrations across logistics, support, billing, vendor systems
- SaaS / product delivery architecture and design-review standards

## Tools
Java, Spring Boot, Kubernetes, Azure/AKS, GCP, AWS, Jenkins, Docker
